title: rothmannia negrosensis
intro: Rothmannia negrosensis is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the Mabolo or Camachile tree. The medicinal properties of Rothmannia negrosensis include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
